title: Xaero's Cobblemon Icons
description: This is a resource pack which adds Cobblemon icons to Xaero's minimap
body:
# Cobblemon Icons for Xaero's minimap

This resource pack makes Cobblemon appear as Icons on Xaeros minimap! 

**This supports (almost) all Cobblemon, and has a distinguished sparkle to highlight shiny Cobblemon!**

No addons are supported yet. Magikarp Jump and custom Roanoke network icons are planned for 3.0

## Version 2.0 - HD Icons

Version 2.0 is here, featuring 

**Sharper Icons** - Using Nearest Neighbor scaling, enjoy a crisp Icon no matter how large

![Icon](https://imgur.com/hUgsVb9.png)

**Shiny Sparkles** - No more squinting to distinguish a slight hue change, all shiny Cobblemon have a distinctive sparkle

![Imgur](https://imgur.com/Md64Pyu.png)

**Variant Support** - Support for most Alolan variants, with more on the way! 

![Imgur](https://imgur.com/vL8DW6v.png)
